Home › Contact
Free & No Obligation

Schedule a Meet & Greet

The best way to decide if Forward Family Medicine is right for you is to come in and meet us. Ask everything. See the office. It's free. No pressure. No commitment. Just a conversation.

Request Your Free Meet & Greet

Fill out the form below and we'll reach out within 24 hours to schedule your visit. No pressure, no commitment, no credit card.

We'll contact you within 24 hours. Your information is never shared or sold.

Office Hours Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Serving the Main Line

We see patients from across the Main Line and greater Philadelphia area, including:

  • Wayne, PA
  • Berwyn & Devon
  • Paoli & Malvern
  • Radnor & Villanova
  • Chester County
  • Greater Philadelphia

Ready to Enroll?

If you've already met with us and are ready to join, enroll directly online:

Enroll as Individual Enroll Your Family Patient Portal Login

What Happens After You Submit

  1. We review your request
  2. We reach out within 24 hours to schedule
  3. You come in for your free meet & greet
  4. You decide — no pressure, no obligation

295 Old Eagle School Road, Wayne, PA 19087

Get Directions →
FFM Forward Family Medicine

The Main Line's only Direct Primary Care practice with in-person, board-certified Lifestyle Medicine.

© 2026 Forward Family Medicine. All rights reserved.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
